app.name: KAM AI-First Toolkit
app.tagline: 50 AI Prompts + 8 Templates for Key Accounts

landing.hero: The AI Toolkit for Key Account Managers
landing.subtitle: 50 AI prompts + 8 templates + interactive tools to structure, analyze and grow your strategic accounts.

features.promptsDesc: Ready-to-use prompts for Claude, ChatGPT or any LLM. Copy, paste, instant results.
features.templatesDesc: Account Plan, Scoring Matrix, QBR, Capture Plan — downloadable in 1 click.
features.toolsDesc: Scoring Matrix, account plan generator, QBR checklist — right in your browser.
features.aiDesc: Describe your situation and get a personalized action plan in 30 seconds.

landing.social: Used by KAMs in France and internationally

access.title: Log in
access.subtitle: Enter the credentials you received by email after your purchase.
access.error_invalid: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials.

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to your KAM AI-First Toolkit
dashboard.subtitle: Everything you need to structure and grow your strategic accounts.

prompts.title: AI Prompts for KAM
prompts.subtitle: 50 ready-to-copy prompts for Claude, ChatGPT or any LLM.

templates.title: Downloadable Templates
templates.subtitle: 8 essential templates in Excel, Word and PowerPoint format.

tools.title: Interactive Tools
tools.subtitle: Tools to analyze and structure your accounts — right in your browser.

scoring.title: Scoring Matrix
scoring.subtitle: Prioritize your accounts by scoring 6 strategic criteria.
scoring.noAccounts: Add your first account to start scoring.

accountPlan.title: Account Plan Generator
accountPlan.subtitle: Fill in the form step by step to generate your structured plan.

qbrChecklist.title: QBR Checklist
qbrChecklist.subtitle: Prepare your Quarterly Business Review step by step.

relationshipMap.title: Relationship Map
relationshipMap.subtitle: Map the stakeholders in your account.

ai.title: KAM AI Coach
ai.subtitle: Describe your situation and get personalized recommendations.
ai.placeholder: Describe your situation... E.g.: I'm preparing a QBR with a client who is threatening to leave...
ai.limitReachedBody: For unlimited AI sales coaching, switch to Gordon.

gordon.title: Level up with Gordon
gordon.subtitle: Gordon is your personal AI sales coach — available 24/7 to train, advise and help you grow.

comingSoon.aiDescription: The AI Coach will soon be available to help you with your strategic key account decisions.
comingSoon.tip2: 4 interactive tools (Scoring, Account Plan, QBR, Mapping)
comingSoon.gordonMessage: Gordon is coming soon to revolutionize your sales coaching.
comingSoon.gordonSub: Sign up to be notified at launch.

privacy.notice: Your data stays on your device. No personal information (names, accounts, contacts) is sent to our servers. 100% GDPR compliant.
privacy.footer: Data stored locally in your browser only.
